title: Lucky's Armory
description: A Minecraft Mod that adds vanilla friendly armor into the game.
body:
![Cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/862d0e14d589704463e5f7a69c4f81c6ac30b305_0.webp)
![Dye Your Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd86f47846e52cc42f879f165070d48f33e83959_0.webp)
![Trim Your Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9080a85b3403e35429f34b3672ca2ab15065c352_0.webp)
![Check Out My Other Mods!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f813f1a576b5ef8972a18cc7b70c64026ad2d29c.png)
![Join The Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9c0bc3a225f3c0a4655cbe81d6ff766fdcb4064.png)

Translation:

Lucky's Armory is a vanilla-friendly Minecraft mod that expands your armor options without straying from the game's original style. Designed to blend seamlessly with the base game, this mod introduces Light and Heavy variants of existing armor sets, offering players more strategic choices in protection and mobility.

- Light Armor offers increased speed and agility, perfect for explorers, ranged combat, or players who prefer mobility over brute strength.

- Heavy Armor provides greater defense and durability, at the cost of movement speed, ideal for frontline combat and tanking mobs head-on.

Whether you're sneaking through caves or charging into battle, Lucky's Armory gives you the flexibility to equip gear that fits your playstyle—all while staying true to the Minecraft aesthetic.
